rationale: C+B is ADDRESSED for the round-6 structural additions: AC11 and AC12 each pair a function-existence discriminator with an exact-named go test -run, and both symbols are absent at 8b07e89f. BranchExistsE, ScanOrphanedClosedBeads, show-ref Go usage, and deleted TestBranchExistsE_* references all have zero hits. Across AC1-AC7 and AC11-AC12, every named test has an exact-named run. However, AC10's full proof is already GREEN at 8b07e89f: the exactly-one workflow ownership assertion succeeds and go test ./internal/lifecycle passes. The panel lens explicitly makes any GREEN AC proof non-discriminating and therefore REQUEST_CHANGES.
concrete_changes_required: Make AC10 genuinely RED at 8b07e89f while retaining its exactly-one workflow ownership invariant, for example by adding a new exact-named structural test with a function-existence grep and matching exact-named go test -run; update Validation Proofs accordingly.

findings.detail: AC11 and AC12 have existence discriminators plus exact-named runs and are genuinely RED at the pinned HEAD; deleted-classifier Go-code pins are all zero.
AC10's entire proof passes unchanged at 8b07e89f, so it cannot discriminate the proposed implementation.
